questions.question: Describe the difference between a photometric image and a radiometric image. Provide an example to support your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the key aspects of each type of image.

questions.question: Explain the concept of intensity and its representation in a photometric image. How does it relate to the actual brightness of an image?
questions.hint: Consider the physical properties of light and its interaction with the image sensor.

questions.question: An image sensor captures an image with an intensity value of 100. What is the corresponding gray level value in a photometric image, assuming an 8-bit representation?
questions.hint: Refer to the mapping between intensity values and gray levels.
